bird.name: Balsas screech owl
bird.summary: The Balsas screech owl (Megascops seductus) is a species of owl in the family Strigidae. It is endemic to Mexico.

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Balsas screech owl
relations.evidence: It inhabits arid open and semi-open areas such as deciduous woodland with cactus, thorn forest, and secondary forest

relations.subject: Balsas screech owl
relations.evidence: It can also be found in tropical scrublands and the edges of cultivated areas
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: Balsas screech owl
relations.evidence: However, its population is unknown and is suspected to be in decline due to habitat loss and degradation
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
